tokenizer.dir_sha256_method: j_pretrain.data.tokenizer.tokenizer_sha256 (sha256 over sorted filename+bytes); this is the canonical fingerprint stamped into every shard/probe manifest. (Prior value b4ec3f78… was a bytes-only hash of the identical frozen files — same bytes, different method; reconciled to the canonical function, see DECISIONS.md.)

budgets.note: Token budgets are floored to whole seq_len windows at build time; exact counts recorded in each packed manifest.

split_policy.description: Per-mille document-hash bands: val=[0,5), tune=[5,10), train=[10,1000). C4 also has a native validation split used for eval; MusicPile/ChemPile carve val by hash. Disjoint by construction.

chempile.config_decision: Use ALL 4 education configs concatenated (deterministic config order) to assemble the chemistry FT corpus; paper only says 'ChemPile / chemistry-domain, 0.3B'. LOCAL_REPRODUCTION_CHOICE.
chempile.provenance: EXPLICIT_PAPER (corpus); HF id + config set INFERRED/LOCAL

probes.note: First 256 val windows per corpus, frozen token IDs; same probes for every checkpoint.
